programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Laços - T01E48
programme.desc: 2008. Quebrar a barreira de cinco selos ativa uma armadilha, e a equipe Guy enfrenta cópias idênticas de si mesmos. Deidara e Sasori lutam para se apoderar do jinchuriki. Forçado a seguir Naruto, Kakashi pede que vovó Chiyo e Sakura não façam nada precipitado. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Algo Importante... - T01E49
programme.desc: 2008. A luta entre avó e neto começa. Para derrotar o verdadeiro Sasori dentro do boneco, Hiruko deve ser destruído primeiro. Só a própria avó consegue entender as armadilhas complexas de Sasori, mas é Sakura que deve dar o golpe final. Que estratégia usarão? programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A História Do Álbum Ilustrado - T01E50
programme.desc: 2008. Chiyo e Sakura expõem Sasori, que não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos. Chiyo fica mais chocada com o segundo boneco que Sasori revela. Sasori foi quem planejou o desaparecimento do kazecage. Uma equipe ninja se dirige a um certo local. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Reencontro - T01E51
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura fica cercada por uma nuvem de veneno e usa um papel bomba para se livrar da fumaça. Ela tenta capturar Sasori para forçá-lo a dar informações sobre Orochimaru, invocando dois bonecos para esta batalha. Naruto e Kakashi ainda perseguem Deidara! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Poder De Uchiha - T01E52
programme.desc: 2008. Os bonecos criados de humanos podem comandar o jutsu que o humano usava enquanto vivo. Assim, o boneco do terceiro kazekage converte chakras em poderes magnéticos. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Título - T01E53
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura revida o ataque da areia de ferro. Ela rapidamente começa a ler os padrões de ataque do Sasori, que se prepara para usar seu chakra. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contorção - T02E56

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Solidão - T02E58
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura corre para achar Naruto com Vovó Chiyo, sofrendo envenenada. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Novo Inimigo - T02E59
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde o controle e o espírito da Raposa de Nove Caudas assume o comando. Kakashi consegue suprimir a Raposa de Nove Caudas. Deidara descobre a derrota de Sasori. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Companheiro De Equipe! - T02E62
programme.desc: 2008. Kakashi é hospitalizado devido à tensão causada por seu mangekyo sharinga. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Dois Reis - T02E63
programme.desc: 2008. Sai diz que ele e Naruto se encontrarão de novo e desaparece. Homura e Koharu dizem a Tsunade que Naruto não deve ser enviado em missões envolvendo a Akatsuki. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Sinal De Fogo Preto - T02E64

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Presa Na Escuridão - T02E65
programme.desc: 2008. A nova equipe Kakashi segue em direção à ponte Tenchi. Quando Sai mostra seu desprezo por Sasuke, o antagonismo com Naruto aumenta. Yamato decide que eles passarão a noite em uma pousada para tentar melhorar as relações entre os membros de sua equipe. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Almas Ressuscitadas - T02E66
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura vê Sai trabalhando em uma pintura abstrata e encontra um livro de desenhos incomum no meio das coisas dele. Enquanto vão em direção à ponte Tenchi, eles se mantêm atentos contra qualquer emboscada. Yamato orienta sua equipe caso uma luta aconteça. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden - T02E67
programme.desc: 2008. Yamato faz uma simulação para avaliar as habilidades e técnicas de luta da equipe Kakashi. Sai abandona Naruto para concluir a missão simulada. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Momento De Despertar - T02E68

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Desespero - T02E69

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Meu Amigo - T02E71

programme.desc: Beyblade Burst - T03E15

Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marina Inoue, Junya Enoki, Fumihiro Okabayashi Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

Após meses de treinamento, Fubuki está pronto para enfrentar seu velho amigo? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marina Inoue, Junya Enoki, Fumihiro Okabayashi Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Beyblade Burst - T03E23

programme.title: 2023. A gangue do duelista americano nº 1, Bandit Keith, sequestra Joey para uma caverna secreta com um cemitério como campo de jogo. Enquanto Yugi e seus amigos procuram por ele, Joey enfrenta monstros zumbis que ficam mais forte ao saírem de seus túmulos! Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E18

programme.title: 2023. Presos na caverna labirinto, Yugi e seus amigos encontram uma saída alternativa, mas a porta é vigiada pelos Irmãos Paradoxo, irmãos de Pegasus. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E19

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E20

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E26

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E28

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: American boy Dre Parkers fighting skills are no match for Cheng, the school bully. He finds a friend in Mr. Han, a maintenance man who is also a martial-arts master. Mr. Han teaches Dre kung fu in the hope that Dre will be able to face down Cheng. Starring Jaden Smith, Jackie Chan, Taraji P. Henson.

programme.title: I Wish You All the Best
programme.desc: A high school junior comes out as nonbinary and is thrown out of their familys home. After enrolling in a new school, they find support from an eccentric art teacher while forming an unexpected bond with a kindhearted student. Starring Corey Fogelmanis, Miles Gutierrez-Riley, Lena Dunham.

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: An English charmer (Hugh Grant) and a lusty American (Andie MacDowell) make love over a course of surprising events. Starring Hugh Grant, Andie MacDowell, Kristin Scott Thomas.

programme.title: Double Happiness
programme.desc: Pleasing her Chinese-Canadian father (Stephen Chang) means an aspiring actress (Sandra Oh) must sacrifice her own pursuits. Starring Sandra Oh, Stephen A. Chang, Alannah Ong.

programme.title: Our House
programme.desc: A science wiz creates a machine that can bring back dead loved ones, which seems like a great idea -- until the wrong spirits are unleashed. Starring John Ralston, Thomas Mann, Percy Hynes White.

programme.title: Mommy
programme.desc: A peculiar neighbor (Suzanne Clement) offers hope to a recent widow (Anne Dorval) who is struggling to raise a teenager (Antoine-Olivier Pilon) who is unpredictable and, sometimes, violent. Starring Anne Dorval, Antoine Olivier Pilon, Suzanne Clement.

programme.title: Step Dogs
programme.desc: Meatball, a wise cracking country dog, and Cassie, Hollywoods most pampered pet, meet when their owners get married. The two fight constantly until burglars break into their house, and they must team up to protect their home. Starring Dylan Schmid, Brittney Wilson, Eliana Jones.

programme.title: Legend of the Guardians: The Owls of GaHoole
programme.desc: A kidnapped owlet breaks away from his captors and, with his new companions, sets out to find a band of mythic warriors to defend his race from the evil Pure Ones. Starring Jim Sturgess, Emily Barclay, Ryan Kwanten.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: An English orphan (Kate Maberly) discovers her bitter uncles garden with her sickly cousin (Heydon Prowse), and it is magical. Starring Kate Maberly, Heydon Prowse, Maggie Smith.

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz
programme.desc: After a tornado whisks Kansas farm girl Dorothy (Judy Garland) to a magic land, she must travel to the Emerald City for help in getting back home. Starring Judy Garland, Frank Morgan, Ray Bolger.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: A poor boy (Freddie Highmore) and four spoiled children win a tour through the incredible factory of an odd confectioner (Johnny Depp). Starring Johnny Depp, Freddie Highmore, David Kelly.

programme.title: Shrek

programme.title: Dont You Forget About Me

programme.title: Real Time

programme.desc: Will and Henry travel to the UK to follow up on a werewolf sighting and end up uncovering a dark connection to Henrys past and future.

programme.title: Chaos to Calm - Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: This bachelor makes some efforts to organize his closet but he stalls, not for lack of motivation, but because he simply doesnt know what to do to make his closet work more efficiently; his busy life necessitates a well-ordered closet.

programme.title: In Touch With Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Charles Stanley, pastor of the First Baptist Church in Atlanta, shares his insights on Christian faith and enlightens viewers with spiritual motivation.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: When Bullethead (William Lee Scott) gets arrested, Steve (Steve Harvey) finds out that being a teacher doesnt end at 5 p.m.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Mr. Hightowers Opus
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) accepts a bet from Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) to organize a band before the school banquet.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Rock
programme.desc: Sara and Romeo (Nefta Perry, Merlin Santana) are caught in a closet together; Cedric (Cedric The Entertainer) campaigns to win Teacher of the Month. With Steve Harvey.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Brush With Greatness
programme.desc: Romeo (Merlin Santana) uses Sophias (Tracy Vilar) painting to win first place in an art contest; Cedric (Cedric The Entertainer) goes on a shopping spree.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Loose Lips Sink Friendships
programme.desc: Romeo (Merlin Santana) insults Sophia (Tracy Vilar) and then scrambles to make amends before he can make romance at the dance. With Steve Harvey.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Papa Dont Take No Mess
programme.desc: Romeo (Merlin Santana) must learn how to stand up to his father (Hector Maisonette); a mouse invades Steve and Cedrics (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) apartment.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Plays Not the Thing
programme.desc: Sophia wins the role of Juliet in her schools production of Romeo and Juliet, but Romeo is not chosen to play opposite her.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Brothers
programme.desc: Cedric (Cedric The Entertainer) turns Steve (Steve Harvey) on to being a Big Brother, but it turns out to be more than Steve can handle.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Hi-Top Reunion
programme.desc: Steves old singing group reunites for an awards show performance, but Cedric has to fill in when a member gets sick.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Coming to Chicago
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) hurts Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) feelings when he has a fling with an old flame. Guest star Brian McKnight plays himself.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - African-American Me
programme.desc: Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) asks Steve (Steve Harvey) to back up her church choir on piano.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - When the Funk Bites the Dust
programme.desc: Steve and the Hi-Tops celebrate the engagement of Steves former road manager by throwing a bachelor party.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Daddys Baby Girl
programme.desc: A young woman claims Steve (Steve Harvey) is her father, which he accepts, until he learns what shes really after.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Love With Interest
programme.desc: When a smooth talker tries to take advantage of Regina, Steve tries to protect her; Cedric hides a rival schools mascot.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Guess Whos Not Coming to Dinner?
programme.desc: Regina pretends to have a husband to impress an old schoolmate; Steve and his students are stranded in an airport.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Roof Is on Fire
programme.desc: Regina rooms with Steve when a roof fire leaves her homeless; romance heats up between Romeo and Sara.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - I Do, I Dont
programme.desc: Steve refuses to allow Snoop Doggy Dogg and Sean Puffy Combs to use music from the Hi-Tops until they resolve their rivalry.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Cant Buy Me Love
programme.desc: A new student (Kenan Thompson) gives Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) an extravagant birthday gift, but Steve (Steve Harvey) pretends it is from him.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Somebodys Sleepin in My Bed
programme.desc: Lovitas (Terri J. Vaughn) frequent visits stress Steve (Steve Harvey); Romeo (Merlin Santana) teaches Aisha (Ariyan Johnson) to dance.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Bully Call
programme.desc: A bully thwarts Romeos plans for a dance date; Steves ego is hurt when Regina beats him at Scrabble.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dont Quit Your Day Job
programme.desc: Steve urges Romeo to join the choir despite his lack of musical ability; Cedric helps Bullethead take on the school bully.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Lets Talk About Sax
programme.desc: Steve lands an audition with a record producer, then panics when he realizes he doesnt have his saxophone.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - When the Funk Hits the Rib Tips
programme.desc: Steve battles with his former group to become the house act at a local nightclub.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Im Not a Chauvinist, Piggy
programme.desc: Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) televised battle with a chicken mascot at a basketball game tests Steves (Steve Harvey) manliness.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Daddy Meets the Man of Steele
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend of Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) comes into town, Steve (Steve Harvey) gets a date to make Regina jealous. Guest star: Adele Givens.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Shut Up and Kiss Me
programme.desc: Romeo uses romance to keep a gifted singer from upstaging his act with Bullethead in the school talent contest.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Youre Driving Me Crazy
programme.desc: Regina and Warringtons (Wendy Raquel Robinson, guest star Dorien Wilson) spat leaves Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) out in the cold.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dancing Fools
programme.desc: Regina and Cedric (Wendy Raquel Robinson, Cedric The Entertainer) battle Lovita and Steve (Terri J. Vaughn, Steve Harvey) in a dance competition; Romeo (Merlin Santana) tries to get good grades.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Breakfast With Tiffany
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) is recruited to help raise the spirits of Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) newly separated friend Tiffany (guest star Jackie Mari Roberts).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Papas Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: An insurance policy makes Steve (Steve Harvey) suspicious of his fathers (guest star Richard Gant) new young fiancee (guest star Jaqueline Fleming).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Just My Imagination
programme.desc: Steve and Romeo fight for the same womans attention; Cedric and Lovita question their compatibility.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Maid to Order
programme.desc: Hiring a maid (Esther Scott) leads to even more work for Steve, Cedric and Regina (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer, Wendy Raquel Robinson).

programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: American Gigolo (1980)
programme.desc: A professional Beverly Hills escort falls in love with a big shots wife and winds up framed for murder.

programme.title: The Time Machine (2002)
programme.desc: A scientist (Guy Pearce) travels into the future and meets a race of people who fear hideous monsters living under the ground.

programme.title: Cujo (1983)
programme.desc: Bitten by a rabid bat, a huge dog traps a Maine woman (Dee Wallace) and her young son (Danny Pintauro) in their Ford Pinto.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension (2015)
programme.desc: An old and mysterious camcorder leads to the discovery of a supernatural terror in a familys new home.

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: Recovering drug addict Ashley Smith (Kate Mara) reads Rick Warrens "The Purpose Driven Life" as armed fugitive Brian Nichols (David Oyelowo) holds her hostage in her apartment.

programme.title: Things to Do in Denver When Youre Dead (1995)
programme.sub-title: Things to Do in Denver When Youre Dead (1995)
programme.desc: Five former criminals are targeted for death when a simple extortion scheme for a paralyzed mobster goes awry.

programme.title: Crisis (2021)
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her sons disappearance.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Jack Reacher (2012)
programme.desc: A defense attorney hires an enigmatic ex-Army investigator to tackle the case of a highly trained sniper who apparently murdered five people at random.

programme.title: The Gift (2000)
programme.desc: Telling fortunes to support herself and her daughter, a psychic widow (Cate Blanchett) assists the police in a missing persons case.

programme.title: Shutter Island (2010)
programme.desc: A 1950s lawman (Leonardo DiCaprio) pursues a murderess who appears to have vanished from a locked room within a fortresslike psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: American Assassin (2017)
programme.desc: Cold War veteran Stan Hurley takes CIA black ops recruit Mitch Rapp under his wing, and they join forces with a lethal Turkish agent to stop a mysterious operative who wants to start a global war.

programme.title: Asking for It (2022)
programme.desc: A victim of sexual assault joins an all-female gang that targets violent frat boys and a corrupt police force of human traffickers.

programme.title: Due Justice (2023)
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: Supercop (1992)
programme.desc: A Hong Kong policeman (Jackie Chan) and a mainland policewoman (Michelle Yeaoh) meet, team up and join a drug ring to destroy it.

programme.title: Outlaw Posse (2024)
programme.desc: In 1908 an outlaw returns from years of hiding in Mexico to claim stolen gold hidden in the hills of Montana.

programme.title: Old Henry (2021)
programme.desc: A quiet man and his son take in a wounded stranger near his homestead, along with a bag full of cash. The stranger claims hes a sheriff being pursued by outlaws, but the man cant be sure.

programme.title: Changeland (2019)
programme.desc: A man meets up with his best friend in Thailand while going through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: Reindeer Games (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.title: Assassination Nation (2018)
programme.desc: A small town gets turned upside down when an anonymous hacker reveals personal messages and secrets of thousands of people. As anger erupts into full-blown violence, four teenage girls find themselves in a fight for their lives against an armed mob.

programme.title: Asking for It (2022)
programme.desc: A victim of sexual assault joins an all-female gang that targets violent frat boys and a corrupt police force of human traffickers.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: The Reader (2008)
programme.desc: In postwar Germany, a teenager (David Kross) has a love affair with an older woman (Kate Winslet) who is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: Restoration (1995)
programme.desc: A hedonistic physician (Robert Downey Jr.) weds the kings (Sam Neill) lover but is not allowed to consummate the marriage in 17th-century England.

programme.title: Miles to Go Before I Sleep
programme.desc: The relationships between musicians and their road crews and the importance of the people who work to put shows together.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner (Burt Lancaster) feels young again with a casino clam shucker (Susan Sarandon) and a lucky cocaine deal.

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Grease (1978)
programme.desc: Nice Sandy (Olivia Newton-John) and greaser Danny (John Travolta) try to be like each other in their 1950s high school.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian counts (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life (2005)
programme.desc: Old wounds get a chance to heal when a Wyoming rancher (Robert Redford) shelters his abused daughter-in-law (Jennifer Lopez) and her child.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives (2004)
programme.desc: A man and his wife move to a quaint suburb where most of the women seem to have the same bland personality.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isnt hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renee Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: The To Do List (2013)
programme.desc: Determined to shed her uptight image, a high-school valedictorian (Aubrey Plaza) decides to lose her virginity before college begins. Realizing that she is out of her depth, she asks friends and family for advice.

programme.title: View From the Top (2003)
programme.desc: A woman (Gwyneth Paltrow) from a small Nevada town makes friends while training to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives (2004)
programme.desc: A man and his wife move to a quaint suburb where most of the women seem to have the same bland personality.

programme.title: Sarafina! (1992)
programme.desc: A South African student (Leleti Khumalo) joins the anti-apartheid revolution in her township of Soweto.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here (2020)
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Love, Rosie (2014)
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex are best friends until Alexs family moves to America. They gamble everything to keep their love and friendship alive over the years and miles.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby (2004)
programme.desc: A deep bond develops between a cantankerous trainer (Clint Eastwood) and the female boxer (Hilary Swank) he reluctantly takes under his wing.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Boudica: Queen of War (2023)
programme.desc: Roman conquerors slay King Prasutagus, take away his children, and force his wife, Boudica, into subservience. Consumed by grief and a burning desire for justice, Boudica vows to reclaim her homeland from the clutches of the Romans.

programme.title: Babel (2006)
programme.desc: A tragic accidents scope expands, catching four groups of people on three continents in its terrible grip.

programme.title: Mourning in Lod (2023)
programme.desc: The fates of three families become inextricably intertwined when a Palestinian citizen is killed by a Jewish settler in the city of Lod, Israel, and deadly riots break out.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here (2020)
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: A Single Man (2009)
programme.desc: Planning to commit suicide at the end of the day, a gay professor (Colin Firth) who recently lost his lover goes about his daily routine and visits with longtime friends.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias (1989)
programme.desc: Based on the play about six Southern women who become close friends despite their eccentricities and complicated lives.

programme.title: Our Friend (2019)
programme.desc: After Nicole and Matthew receive life-altering news, the couple find unexpected support from their friend Dane, who puts his own life on hold to move into their family home.

programme.title: Rosemarys Baby (1968)
programme.desc: A pregnant womans (Mia Farrow) husband (John Cassavetes) and their satanic neighbors want her baby to be the Antichrist.

programme.desc: Three 50-ish college friends (Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton) plot revenge after their husbands dump them for younger women.

programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Its all about a bedroom that feels elegant. Jake lays out a one-of-a-kind accent wall, and Jazz brings the glamour with plush bedroom accessories. On the menu is fried rice, pork tenderloins and red bean paste cookies.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Originally from the East Coast, Meghan is a millennial who tossed caution to the wind to pursue a new career in L.A.; Jake and Jazz take over Meghans studio apartment in Koreatown; Jazz redesigns her space and Jake builds her a custom headboard.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Shay is a single mom who moved from the Midwest to Los Angeles with her young daughter; mommy duties are her first priority, so she has little time for redecorating; shes enlisted the help of Jake and Jazz to make her house feel more like a home.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Jake and Jazz hit all the right notes when it comes to a redesign for music-lover Taylor; Jazz creates personalized vibes by adding cool colors and accent pieces, while Jake builds a unique coffee table to house Taylors record collection.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Mel is a budding celebrity makeup artist who has several jobs; her fashion and jewelry line, which she runs out of her apartment, has created massive clutter; Jake and Jazz work to organize her space so she can live and grow as an entrepreneur.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Jessica is a stay-at-home mom who prides herself on homeschooling her two young sons; her family spends a lot of time in the living room, which is outdated, and in need of a drastic change; Jake and Jazz step in to fulfill her wishes.

programme.title: Living by Design
